Welcome to Fishing Adventures

I was introduced to fishing by my late "Uncle Sonny". My first few experiences where upstate at stocked lakes. It was exciting at first but once I tasted "THE SALT LIFE" I never looked back. For me there is nothing like it. The possibilites are far greater. Now I have a small center console boat that is kept not far from Smithpoint Bridge. I usually cruise between the bridge and Moritches Bay.
